title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入莱索托：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入賴索托：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Lesotho LSI (Lesotho Standards Institution) conformity requirements, LEWA (Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority) regulatory framework, LEC (Lesotho Electricity Company) grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558-2023, and GB 50016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与莱索托LSI（莱索托标准机构）合格评定要求、LEWA（莱索托电力和水务管理局）监管框架、LEC（莱索托电力公司）并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3运输要求及220/380 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023和GB 50016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與賴索托LSI（賴索托標準機構）合格評定要求、LEWA（賴索托電力和水務管理局）監管框架、LEC（賴索托電力公司）併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3運輸要求及220/380 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558-2023和GB 50016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, LSI conformity scope determination, LEWA licensing approval, LEC grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Lesotho LSI technical standards, LEWA licensing requirements, LEC grid-connection technical specifications, fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and SACU/South Africa customs transit requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、LSI合格评定范围裁定、LEWA许可审批、LEC并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行莱索托LSI技术标准、LEWA许可要求、LEC并网技术规格、消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及SACU/南非过境海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、LSI合格評定範圍裁定、LEWA許可審批、LEC併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行賴索托LSI技術標準、LEWA許可要求、LEC併網技術規格、消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及SACU/南非過境海關要求。

answer_first.en: Lesotho's grid operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz — the same nominal voltage and frequency as China, which is a genuine base-parameter match. However, this voltage/frequency alignment does not eliminate compliance gaps: LEWA licensing and LEC grid-connection approval are mandatory for all grid-connected BESS, protection relay settings and anti-islanding requirements differ from Chinese practice, and NRS (South African National Rationalized Specifications) grid codes may apply given Lesotho's electricity sector reliance on South African technical frameworks. On product safety, Lesotho's LSI (Lesotho Standards Institution) requires conformity to IEC 62619 for lithium BESS — Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB 38031 certificates are not accepted as substitutes. Fire protection must comply with NFPA 855, not China's GB 50016. Transport to landlocked Lesotho routes through Durban port and overland via South Africa under SACU customs arrangements, adding transit documentation complexity beyond standard sea freight. Chinese GB certificates cover manufacturing but do not satisfy Lesotho's IEC/NFPA-based project approval and regulatory requirements.
answer_first.zh: 莱索托电网运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz——与中国名义电压和频率相同，属于真正的基础参数匹配。然而，这一电压/频率一致性并不消除合规差距：LEWA许可和LEC并网批准对所有并网BESS均为强制要求，保护继电器设定和防孤岛要求与中国规程不同，鉴于莱索托电力行业对南非技术框架的依赖，NRS（南非国家合理化规范）电网规范亦可能适用。在产品安全方面，莱索托LSI（莱索托标准机构）要求锂BESS符合IEC 62619——中国GB 44240-2024和GB 38031证书不被接受为替代依据。消防保护须符合NFPA 855，而非中国的GB 50016。运往内陆国莱索托须经德班港过境、通过SACU海关安排经南非陆运，增加了超出标准海运的过境文件复杂性。中国GB证书涵盖生产环节，但不满足莱索托基于IEC/NFPA的项目审批和监管要求。
answer_first.zht: 賴索托電網運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz——與中國名義電壓和頻率相同，屬於真正的基礎參數匹配。然而，這一電壓/頻率一致性並不消除合規差距：LEWA許可和LEC併網批准對所有併網BESS均為強制要求，保護繼電器設定和防孤島要求與中國規程不同，鑑於賴索托電力行業對南非技術框架的依賴，NRS（南非國家合理化規範）電網規範亦可能適用。在產品安全方面，賴索托LSI（賴索托標準機構）要求鋰BESS符合IEC 62619——中國GB 44240-2024和GB 38031證書不被接受為替代依據。消防保護須符合NFPA 855，而非中國的GB 50016。運往內陸國賴索托須經德班港過境、通過SACU海關安排經南非陸運，增加了超出標準海運的過境文件複雜性。中國GB證書涵蓋生產環節，但不滿足賴索托基於IEC/NFPA的項目審批和監管要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
